content:
# Precipitation

**Summary**: The formation of a solid from a solution.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987]] investigated precipitation of surfactants in the presence of calcium and high salinity.

## Scientific Context

- [[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987]] A major cause of surfactant loss in carbonate reservoirs.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987]] Monitored via light transmission (turbidity) measurements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Precipitation of sulfonate by NaCl can occur both below as well as above the CMC. ([[1987-ahmed|Ahmed, 1987, p. 105]])
